inboxState.text: Governance Atlas BY ENTRADA GOVERN Command Center Discover Stewardship 184 KNOWLEDGE Glossary & CDEs Lineage Atlas TRUST Audit Evidence Control Center MR Marisol Reyes Finance · Steward Workspace › entrada-prod ⌘K Prototype mock · UC not verified Atlas AI Governance Inbox Prototype inbox rows are local mock governance notifications, not live Databricks workflow evidence. ← Back to Discovery Inbox Unread workflow notifications from governance activity. Inbox No unread items No inbox items are currently available. Atlas AI Prototype mock evidence - not live Databricks x Hi, Marisol. ATLAS AI Ask about prototype dashboard, owner, freshness, and certification examples. I use prototype mock governance metadata, not live Unity Catalog evidence. TRY ASKING What's powering the CFO Quarterly Dashboard, and is anything at risk this week? ↗ Which uncertified tables are queried by executives? ↗ Summarize PII coverage in customer_360. ↗ Who owns net_revenue_usd and when was it last certified? ↗ Atlas AI uses AI. Review for accuracy. i

helpState.text: Governance Atlas BY ENTRADA GOVERN Command Center Discover Stewardship 184 KNOWLEDGE Glossary & CDEs Lineage Atlas TRUST Audit Evidence Control Center MR Marisol Reyes Finance · Steward Workspace › entrada-prod ⌘K Prototype mock · UC not verified Atlas AI Help & docs How Governance Atlas works Prototype QA captures describe intended live Databricks behavior, but this current page evidence is local prototype mock data only. ← Back to Discovery Getting started Who sees what Keyboard shortcuts Getting help Privacy Terms Getting started What is Governance Atlas? Governance Atlas is a Databricks-native metadata command center. It discovers Unity Catalog tables, views, columns, and notebook usage in your workspace and surfaces governance context (domain, owner, sensitivity, glossary term, workflow state, lineage) in one place. How do I find an asset? Use the global search bar at the top of the shell, the Discovery tab for faceted browsing across the catalog, or the Navigation tab for breadth-first catalog-tree browsing. Filters on the left rail narrow by catalog, schema, asset type, domain, owner, sensitivity, glossary term, and workflow state. What do the coverage badges mean? The coverage score on each asset card reflects how complete the asset's governance record is (description, owner, domain, glossary term, quality rules). High Coverage is at least 75%. Mid Coverage is 50-74%. Low Coverage is below 50%. The chip is hidden when the governance backfill has not run for that asset. Who sees what On-behalf-of access When your workspace grants the app the OBO (on-behalf-of) scope,

helpState.text: Governance Atlas BY ENTRADA GOVERN Command Center Discover Stewardship 184 KNOWLEDGE Glossary & CDEs Lineage Atlas TRUST Audit Evidence Control Center MR Marisol Reyes Finance · Steward Workspace › entrada-prod ⌘K Prototype mock · UC not verified Atlas AI Help & docs How Governance Atlas works Prototype QA captures describe intended live Databricks behavior, but this current page evidence is local prototype mock data only. ← Back to Discovery Getting started Who sees what Keyboard shortcuts Getting help Privacy Terms Getting started What is Governance Atlas? Governance Atlas is a Databricks-native metadata command center. It discovers Unity Catalog tables, views, columns, and notebook usage in your workspace and surfaces governance context (domain, owner, sensitivity, glossary term, workflow state, lineage) in one place. How do I find an asset? Use the global search bar at the top of the shell, the Discovery tab for faceted browsing across the catalog, or the Navigation tab for breadth-first catalog-tree browsing. Filters on the left rail narrow by catalog, schema, asset type, domain, owner, sensitivity, glossary term, and workflow state. What do the coverage badges mean? The coverage score on each asset card reflects how complete the asset's governance record is (description, owner, domain, glossary term, quality rules). High Coverage is at least 75%. Mid Coverage is 50-74%. Low Coverage is below 50%. The chip is hidden when the governance backfill has not run for that asset. Who sees what On-behalf-of access When your workspace grants the app the OBO (on-behalf-of) scope,
